VLINCS no-anchor iteration

No-anchor component-graph rank04 p005 gain

A no-anchor component-graph directional rescue moves 21 MCAM04/Tc6 tracklets from component 56 / gid 96000060 to component 86 / gid 960000350. Valid density_simple+p005_area improves IDF1/HOTA/AssA from 0.665246/0.525919/0.537198 to 0.666422/0.526871/0.537617.

Metric
0.666422
canonical density_simple+p005_area IDF1
Delta
0.001176
vs baseline 0.665246
Pipeline module

M7 candidate retrieval + M8 graph resolution + M12 delivery validation

M7 generates broad component-graph bridge candidates from assignment state plus weakmetric/OSNet, DINOv2, and SigLIP tracklet features. M8 accepts a directional larger-target bridge 56->86 without anchors or GT. M12 validates that direct, density_simple, and fixed p005_area delivery all improve.

Used in pipelineyes: promoted as the current no-anchor best assignment/delivery candidate after valid p005_area scoring
No-anchor statusTrue
Method flow

How the run was produced

StepModuleInputActionOutput
1M6 graph staterank77+rank36 combo assignmentfreeze current no-anchor components and statuses92 predicted IDs, 7487 assigned tracklets
2M7 candidate retrievalweakmetric/OSNet + DINOv2 + SigLIP tracklet featurescompose broad component bridge candidates with overlap and multiview thresholds172 bridge candidates
3M10 reviewer/opponentcandidate rows only, no GTsmall-fragment, directional rescue, and low-vote filters2 small fragments, 8 directional rescues, 0 low-vote rescues
4M8 resolutiondirectional rank04 56->86materialize only source component 56 tracklets as manifest_reassign21 MCAM04/Tc6 tracklets move gid 96000060 -> 960000350
5M12 deliverydirect export zipscore direct, apply density_simple, then valid p005_area config0.666422 / 0.526871 / 0.537617
6M12 provenancemetrics, manifests, visual caseswrite README, ppt HTML, spec, case artifactsreproducible gain package
Implementation

What changed

Generated 172 component-graph bridge candidates from the rank77+rank36 combo best using three feature views. The directional reviewer selected 8 non-GT larger-target bridges; rank04 is source component 56 to target component 86, with no-GT graph score 0.800816, target mean similarity 0.797995, best similarity 0.935692, min-view similarity 0.840768, overlap ratio 0.018367, source size 21, target size 107. The assignment exporter materialized only those 21 source tracklets as manifest_reassign; scoring then used the unchanged density_simple and p005_area delivery gates.

Promotion requires the canonical delivery path, not direct full-score alone.

Visual cases

Failure mode and fix

3 component cases, 18 tracklet/frame examples, 3 embedded images. Embedded images remove the local file:// path dependency when this deck is opened from the browser or copied to Bitbucket.

Rank04 component graph bridge 56->86

Promoted case: 21 moved MCAM04/Tc6 tracklets, 8 sampled in the visual case, gid 96000060 -> 960000350.

Previous failure

The previous combo kept a coherent residual island in component 56, so delivery forced those tracklets to gid 96000060 rather than the visually closer split-child target.

New behavior

Directional component-graph rescue accepts the high-similarity larger-target bridge and improves direct, density_simple, and p005_area.

Rank02 small fragment 57->46

Positive ablation: 4 moved tracklets, gid 96000061 -> 96000050, but lower p005 gain than rank04.

Previous failure

A tiny source component remained isolated as its own forced identity.

New behavior

The small-fragment rule correctly moves only the low-mass source into a stronger target, but its global effect is smaller.

Rank01 small-fragment combo

Positive ablation: 6 moved tracklets from two small fragments; improves p005 but remains below rank04.

Previous failure

Two plausible tiny residual islands were both unresolved, but their combined delivery impact is small.

New behavior

The combo confirms the family composes without hurting delivery, while the reviewer still promotes rank04 as the stronger move.
